original_statement: in how many games in this season did no one score for this team?
mutated_statement: in how many instances in this period did no one do something for this group?
mutation_analysis: [Event generalization + Temporal generalization + Action vagueness + Entity generalization]: "games"→"instances" | "this season"→"this period" | "score"→"do something" | "this team"→"this group" (in how many games in this season did no one score for this team? → in how many instances in this period did no one do something for this group?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 中的关键信息可识别：Agent 将变异问题直接解释为“matches with no listed scorers (blank "scorers" column)”并列出具体行号及合计17（“这些出现在行 1, 3, 4, ... 共计 17”）。Agent 的具体表现是直接用自己的映射（instances→games, do something→score, group→team, this period→this season）来计数并给出明确答案，未在任何位置表明问题存在歧义或不确定性，也未向用户询问澄清。由于在 judge_thought 或 critique 中没有出现“模糊”“不确定”“需要更多信息”“无法确定”等表达，且没有请求澄清，说明 Agent 没有意识到指令的模糊性，因而归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
